section.title: Work beyond the experiment
section.intro: For me, strong research also means strong stewardship: training people, building reliable lab systems, and helping the work around me become better.

cards.title: Lab stewardship and training
items: I managed mouse colonies across six breeder lines and strengthened genotyping workflows.
I built inventory and record-keeping systems that reduced supply conflicts and duplicate ordering.
I trained 7 graduate and 6 undergraduate researchers in tissue culture, immunostaining, microscopy, and flow cytometry.
I mentored trainees across microbiology, biological sciences, chemistry, nutritional sciences, and high-school research experiences.

cards.title: Work beyond the bench
items: I led a four-person team in Bayer's AGORIZE Digital Campus Innovation Challenge.
I supported public-affairs and event coordination for major cultural and technical festivals at NIT Allahabad.
I built community across cultures through Bridges International at NYU and Telugu student organizations in India.
I care about fairness in healthcare access, scientific opportunity, and collaborative research culture.
